name: workflow-sdlc
description: SDLC artifact templates and workflows for the workflow plugin. Composable cycles (design-implement-review, sdlc, ideate-elicit-scope-prioritize, scope-execute-evaluate, track-drive-dispatch) built on the core write-review + plan-do primitives, plus canned workflows (bug-fix, cut-release). Depends on workflow-github and workflow-documents.
